buildCommand: (command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -sL -o /tmp/flutter.zip https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.5-stable.zip && unzip -q /tmp/flutter.zip -d /tmp)); export PATH="$PATH:/tmp/flutter/bin"; flutter pub get && flutter build web --release
